About Me

Who I Am & What I Do

I'm Mahbub Simanto, a video editor and content strategist based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. I specialize in short-form content for business owners, creators, and coaches who want to build a powerful personal brand online.

I don't just cut videos — I craft done-for-you content systems that save you time, grow your audience, and turn viewers into paying clients.

My editing style is cinematic, minimal, and built to stop the scroll — whether it's Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, or long-form content.

Specialization
Short-Form Content Systems

How It Works

Simple 3-Step Process

No complicated onboarding. Just results.

1

Send Your Footage

Upload your raw footage to Google Drive or send via WhatsApp. No special format needed — just hit record and send.

2

I Edit & Optimize

I craft your video with cinematic color grading, captions, music, and retention-optimized pacing — built for your brand.

3

You Post & Grow

Receive your polished video within the agreed turnaround. Post it, watch your audience grow, and come back for more.

Pricing

Simple Plans

Choose a plan that fits your content creation needs and budget.

Starter
$350
/month

Ideal for creators uploading up to 5 short videos per month with basic editing.

  • Up to 5 short videos/month
  • 2 revisions per video
  • Basic color grading & audio sync
  • 72-hour turnaround
  • Email & WhatsApp support
Book a Call →
⭐ Popular
Pro
$850
/month

For active creators posting 10–15 videos per month with advanced editing services.

  • Up to 12 videos/month
  • 5 revisions per video
  • Advanced color grading & audio mix
  • 48-hour turnaround
  • Video call support
Book a Call →
Premium
$1200
/month

Complete content strategy and full-service editing for creators and brands.

  • Up to 20 videos/month
  • Unlimited revisions
  • Full content optimization
  • Thumbnail & title strategy
  • Shorts, reels, long-form, podcasts
  • Multi-platform repurposing
Book a Call →
Custom Plan (Recommended)

Tailored plans for content strategists and professional editors handling client-specific projects.

Book a Call →
  • Choose from 10 to 40+ video edits
  • 24h / 48h / 72h delivery
  • Titles, thumbnails & retention tips
  • Shorts, Reels, long-form, podcasts
  • One edit = multi-channel assets
  • Fully flexible scope

FAQ

Questions about Mahbub?

Simply upload your raw footage to Google Drive and share the link, or send directly via WhatsApp. I'll handle everything from there.
Yes! I am currently accepting new clients. Book a discovery call to discuss your project and see if we're a good fit.
I specialize in short-form content for Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok. I also handle long-form YouTube edits and podcast highlight clips.
Simple: you send me your raw footage, I edit it according to your brand style, and deliver within the agreed turnaround time. Revisions are included in every plan.
Yes — one-off edits are available. Use the Custom Plan option or reach out directly via the Let's Talk form below.
